title: Submarine D-1
writer: Frank Wead, Warren Duff, Lawrence Kimble
actors: Pat O'Brien, George Brent, Wayne Morris
plot: Navy officers fall for Ann. She has her own plans. USS Pensacola is struck during a last dive drill, there is an attempt to rescue. The USS Dolphin (D-1) and her crew depart from Connecticut to San Diego via the Panama Canal. They...
